name: pre-edit-subagent-sibling-collision
description: SB-25 composite identity: two subagents of ONE parent session are distinct coherence peers. Subagent A acquires EXCLUSIVE on a tracked path (preflight); sibling subagent B's pre-edit on the same path then surfaces a collision warning (ok+collision+allow envelope). Pre-SB-25 both subagents collapsed into the parent identity and this conflict was structurally invisible (the acquireExclusive self-skip saw one agent). additionalContext is ignored (holder short-id + timestamps vary per run); the collision KEYS are the parity contract.
